title: Funtime PL2140 Mega Sling Shotz, Party Game
description: Product Description Everyone loves a good clean water-fight and the Mega sling shot catapult will equip your aquatic armours with the perfect water mortar. There is no need for anymore weak-wristed water balloon hurling now that you have the Mega sling shot in your artillery it is the ultimate in outdoor fun. Firing over 300 feet the Mega sling shot requires three people for the ultimate launch and distance. One person on each handle and one to pull back and fire. Comes complete with 150 water bombs and tap connector for filling. Safety Warning Children under 8 can easily choke or suffocate on uninflated balloons
